title: Dialog Button LAF Customization
description: laf.registerFunction("drawDialogButton") used to restyle the sample import dialog buttons. Applies custom colors and labels based on obj.text, handling "Install Samples", "Choose Sample Folder", and fallback cases.

title: Offline Audio Rendering with MIDI Events
description: Engine.renderAudio() and Engine.createMessageHolder() used to build a MIDI event list and render audio offline. Creates note-on/off pairs with timestamps, passes them to the render function, and provides a progress callback with channel data and completion status.

title: Programmatic UI Component Creation
description: Content.addPanel, Content.addKnob, and Content.addButton used to create UI components in script with Content.setPropertiesFromJSON for configuration. Shows parentComponent nesting, plugin parameter exposure, and property initialization.

title: Write JSON Data to Preset File
description: FileSystem child file used to write a JSON object to a preset file with existence validation. Demonstrates File.writeObject for persisting preset data to the user preset directory.

title: Custom Automation Slots with UserPresetHandler
description: Engine.createUserPresetHandler() with setCustomAutomation and attachAutomationCallback to create reassignable automation slots. Defines a custom preset data model with setUseCustomUserPresetModel and routes automation values through global cables.

title: Ring Buffer Spectrum Display Properties
description: Engine.createAndRegisterRingBuffer() with setRingBufferProperties to configure FFT spectrum display. Sets buffer length, window type, decibel range, peak decay, logarithmic frequency axis, and gamma correction for external ring buffers.

title: Thread-Safe Ring Buffer Copy
description: Buffer.create and copyReadBuffer used to safely read display buffer data from the timer callback thread. Preallocates a buffer matching the read buffer length and copies via synchronization locks instead of getReadBuffer().

title: SNEX Waveshaper with Dry/Wet Mix
description: SNEX shaper node template with a parameterized dry/wet mix control. Implements an exponential waveshaper transfer function and blends the processed signal with the clean input using a Mix parameter routed via setParameter.

title: Transport Handler Clock Setup
description: Engine.createTransportHandler() configured with grid sync, PreferExternal mode, and internal clock fallback. Enables LFO synchronization to DAW transport with automatic fallback to internal clock when playback is stopped.

title: SliderPack Reference Caching for LAF
description: Caches Content.getComponent references in an object keyed by component name for efficient access inside LAF paint routines. Avoids calling getComponent() during paint calls by pre-resolving SliderPack references at init time.

title: Dynamic IR Loading with Slot FX
description: SlotFX getCurrentEffect and Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor used to dynamically load impulse response files into a convolution reverb inside a SlotFX chain. Retrieves the active effect ID at runtime and sets the audio file.

title: Aspect Ratio Preserving Rectangle Fit
description: Utility function that returns a copy of a target rectangle adjusted to match the aspect ratio of a source rectangle. Useful for fitting a Path into a given area via Path.getBounds() without skewing proportions.

title: Expansion MIDI File Listing
description: ExpansionHandler getRootFolder and FileSystem.findFiles used to list MIDI files from an expansion's MidiFiles directory. Creates the directory if missing with createDirectory and populates a viewport with the filenames.

title: Broadcaster Shift-Key Component Watcher
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents and addComponentPropertyListener to dynamically change knob colors when shift-dragging. Watches mouse events on multiple components and updates itemColour properties based on modifier key state.

title: Local LAF Filter Drag Handle
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with registerFunction("drawFilterDragHandle") to customize the appearance of EQ filter drag handles. Draws a filled ellipse with the filter index number centered on each handle position.

title: Multi-Sampler Section Power Toggle
description: Component array with setValue and changed() used to toggle multiple sampler power buttons from a single section control. Iterates button references to cascade enable/disable state and trigger their callbacks.

title: Transport Handler DAW Sync Setup
description: Engine.createTransportHandler() with setEnableGrid, setSyncMode(PreferExternal), and startInternalClock to sync LFOs to DAW transport. Falls back to internal clock when DAW playback is stopped.

title: Broadcaster EQ Mouse Event Watcher
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents to monitor parametric EQ floating tile interactions. Fires a listener callback on drag and click events to synchronize knob values with EQ band changes.

title: Broadcaster MIDI Player Sequence Callback
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with setEnableQueue and Synth.getMidiPlayer setSequenceCallback to monitor MIDI content changes. Uses the broadcaster as a direct callback object and dumps the event list when the sequence updates.

title: OSC Messaging Between HISE Instances
description: Engine.getGlobalRoutingManager with connectToOSC, sendOSCMessage, and addOSCCallback for inter-instance communication. Configures source/target ports and a domain prefix, then sends and receives string messages over OSC.

title: Animated Panel Open/Close Slide
description: Panel timer callback used to animate a sliding open/close effect triggered by a button. Increments or decrements panel width each tick and repositions to slide from right to left with boundary clamping.

title: RSA Encryption and Decryption
description: FileSystem.encryptWithRSA and decryptWithRSA used to encrypt and decrypt string data with RSA key pairs generated from Tools menu. Demonstrates the key format and round-trip encryption workflow.

title: Batched RSA Encryption Loop
description: FileSystem.encryptWithRSA called in batches of 100 to avoid HISE execution timeout. Splits a large array into chunks and logs progress, working around the script execution time limit for bulk encryption operations.

title: Global Routing Cable Callback
description: Engine.getGlobalRoutingManager with getCable and registerCallback to listen for value changes on a named global cable. Attaches an asynchronous UI-thread callback that fires whenever the cable value updates.

title: Rectangle Utility Namespace
description: Namespace of inline functions mimicking juce::Rectangle methods for array-based rectangle manipulation. Includes reduced, contains, withSizeKeepingCentre, removeFromLeft/Right/Top/Bottom, translated, scale, and copy for LAF paint routine layout calculations.

title: Triangle XY Pad with Drag Constraint
description: Panel mouse callback implementing a triangular XY pad controller with distance-based value calculation. Uses atan2 angle computation and radius clamping to constrain a draggable point within the intersection of three circles, outputting three distance-based values.

title: Multi-Slot Audio File Loading
description: Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor with getAudioFile to access multiple audio file slots from a single ScriptNode effect. Loads audio files into specific slot indices for multi-IR or multi-sample configurations.

title: Custom Volume and Pitch Fade Curves
description: Engine.createFadeHandler with setCustomVolumeFadeCallbacks and setCustomPitchFadeCallbacks to define per-event fade curves. Supports predefined types (Logarithmic, Linear) and registration to specific sound generators or as a global fade handler.

title: Sampler Sample Start/End/Loop Knob Controls
description: Synth.getSampler with createSelection and Sampler property constants (SampleStart, SampleEnd, LoopStart, LoopEnd, LoopXFade) to control sample playback ranges from knobs. Includes sample map loading via combo box with Sampler.getSampleMapList.

title: Keyboard Key Colour from Sample Map
description: Engine.setKeyColour with Sampler.isNoteNumberMapped to visually indicate which keys have mapped samples on the floating tile keyboard. Iterates all 128 MIDI notes and dims unmapped keys.

title: JSON File Existence Check
description: Engine.loadFromJSON with truthiness check to verify whether a JSON file exists in the project folder. Returns undefined if the file is missing, enabling simple conditional logic for optional configuration loading.

title: Encrypted Preference File Load/Save
description: File.writeEncryptedObject and loadEncryptedObject used to persist and retrieve encrypted JSON preference data. Creates the file on first run with a PIN key and loads it on subsequent launches with isDefined validation.

title: ComboBox LAF with Triangle Indicator
description: laf.registerFunction("drawComboBox") to custom-render a combo box with rounded rectangle border, left-aligned text, and a downward-pointing triangle indicator. Uses Colours.withAlpha for enabled/disabled state styling.

title: Convolution Reverb FFT Type Selection
description: Synth.getEffect with setAttribute to set the FFT algorithm type on a Convolution Reverb. Documents the FFT type constants: 0 (best available), 1 (IPP), 2 (Apple Accelerate), 3 (Ooura fallback).

title: Linked Delay Knobs with Toggle
description: Knob callback with Button.getValue check to conditionally link two knobs. Sets a delay module attribute and mirrors the value to a second knob via setValue and changed() when the link button is active.

title: Cross-Platform File Launch with startAsProcess
description: Engine.getOS with FileSystem.fromAbsolutePath and File.startAsProcess to open a PDF or folder on macOS and Windows. Checks for file existence before launching and handles per-platform absolute paths.

title: List Module Attribute IDs
description: Synth.getMidiProcessor with getNumAttributes and getAttributeId to enumerate all parameter names of an Arpeggiator or any HISE module. Useful for discovering unlisted attribute constants.

title: Panel Image with Opacity Knob
description: Panel.loadImage and setPaintRoutine with g.setOpacity and g.drawImage to display a project folder image with knob-controlled transparency. Repaints the panel from the knob's control callback.

title: Randomize All UI Controls
description: Content.getAllComponents with Math.randInt to randomize every UI control value within its min/max range. Skips the trigger button itself and calls changed() on each component to fire callbacks.

title: Expansion Handler with Sample Map Browser
description: Engine.createExpansionHandler with setAllowedExpansionTypes, setCurrentExpansion, and setExpansionCallback to build an expansion-aware sample map browser. Lists available expansions in a combo box and updates the sample map list when switching expansions, stripping expansion path prefixes for display.

title: Custom PNG Keyboard with Filmstrip Images
description: Global LAF drawWhiteNote and drawBlackNote with loadImage to render a custom keyboard using per-key filmstrip PNGs. Handles pressed/released states, key colour overlays, hover highlighting, and octave number labels on C keys.

title: Sampler Loop Enable Toggle
description: Sampler.createSelection with Sampler.LoopEnabled to toggle loop mode on all samples in a sampler via a button callback. Iterates the full sample selection and sets the loop state.

title: Audio Pool Files Split by Folder
description: Engine.loadAudioFilesIntoPool with substring parsing to split the audio file list into separate folder name and file name arrays. Extracts the subfolder structure from PROJECT_FOLDER paths and deduplicates folder names.

title: Audio Pool Files Sorted by Folder Object
description: Engine.loadAudioFilesIntoPool with isDefined and dynamic object properties to organize audio files into a single object keyed by folder name. Each key holds an array of filenames, enabling access via sorted.folderName[index].

title: Rotary Slider LAF with Arc and Line Indicator
description: laf.registerFunction("drawRotarySlider") with Content.createPath, g.drawPath, and g.rotate to draw a custom rotary knob with arc track and rotating line indicator. Calculates arc position from value range and renders with configurable stroke and indentation.

title: MIDI Note Number to Name Conversion
description: Utility function converting a MIDI note number (0-127) to a human-readable note name with octave (e.g., "C3", "F#5"). Uses modulo 12 for note letter lookup and division for octave calculation.

title: Server Response Logger to File
description: Server callback function that writes the HTTP response object and status code to a text file on the Desktop using FileSystem.getFolder and File.writeObject. Useful for debugging Server.callWithGET responses in compiled plugins.

title: Server API User Thumbnail Downloader
description: Server.callWithGET with REST API endpoint, Server.downloadFile, and Server.setBaseURL to batch-download user profile images from a NodeBB forum. Parses user objects, distinguishes local vs external image URLs, and saves files with username-based filenames.

title: Show/Hide Components by Selector Index
description: Array indexOf comparison with showControl to show or hide a series of knobs based on a selector component's value. Uses a ternary on the index comparison to toggle visibility.

title: Scrolling Text Credits with Timer
description: Engine.createTimerObject with Panel.setPaintRoutine to animate vertically scrolling text. Draws an array of names at calculated y-offsets and decrements the offset each timer tick to create a scrolling credits effect.

title: Toggle Button LAF with Hover States
description: laf.registerFunction("drawToggleButton") with obj.value, obj.over, obj.bgColour, and obj.itemColour1/2 to render a custom toggle button. Applies different fill colors for on/off and hover states with rounded rectangle and centered text.

title: Sample Map Browser with Prev/Next Buttons
description: Sampler.getSampleMapList with combo box and prev/next button callbacks to browse and load sample maps. Wraps around at list boundaries and triggers loadSampleMap through the combo box changed() callback.

title: Preset Browser Dialog Button LAF
description: laf.registerFunction("drawDialogButton") to restyle preset browser buttons (Add, Rename, Delete, Save Preset, More) with custom uppercase text. Maps original button labels to display names via parallel arrays.

title: ComboBox Image Switcher
description: Component array with showControl to display one image at a time based on combo box selection. Hides all images in a loop then shows only the one matching the selected index.

title: Value Range Remapping Function
description: Utility inline function to linearly remap a value from one range (oldMin-oldMax) to another (newMin-newMax). Standard linear interpolation formula for converting knob values to different parameter ranges.

title: Sequential Server GET Request Chaining
description: Server.callWithGET with named callback functions to chain sequential HTTP requests. Uses the response from the first call to construct the endpoint for the second, avoiding nested anonymous callback spaghetti.

title: Note Duration Measurement with Uptime
description: Engine.getUptime in onNoteOn and onNoteOff callbacks to measure note hold duration in milliseconds. Stores the start time in a reg variable and calculates elapsed time on note release for monophonic timing.
